concept: Could you formulate a survival game where the player character has a plant-based physiology requiring balanced exposure to water, sunlight, and soil nutrients to remain alive? Different body parts can be grown, shed, or modified by adjusting resource allocation, allowing adaptation to changing environmental challenges. Seasonal cycles drastically transform the game world, forcing migration or hibernation strategies during harsh weather conditions. Interaction with animal species ranges from symbiotic relationships to defending against herbivorous predators who view you as food. The ultimate goal involves reaching and colonizing a legendary fertile valley before a devastating wildfire consumes the known world.
